channel.title: FarmCash Blog
channel.description: FarmCash product updates, referral guides, and reward strategy content.

item.title: Welcome to the FarmCash Blog: What We're Building and Why
item.description: Starter blog post used to validate design, SEO metadata, and CTA behavior.

item.title: FarmCash Waitlist & Referral Guide: Maximize Your Seed Earnings
item.description: Learn how FarmCash's waitlist referral system works. Earn seeds for signup, email verification, and referring friends. Maximize your bonuses before alpha launch.
item.author: Sprout

item.title: How to Earn Seeds in FarmCash: Play Games, Complete Jobs, Get Paid
item.description: Learn how FarmCash's Job Board works. Play games, complete jobs, earn seeds, plant crops, and cash out via PayPal. Real earnings explained.
item.author: Sprout

item.title: The #2 App on the US App Store Just Got Banned by Apple
item.description: FreeCash, a rewards app with 6M downloads/month, was banned for fraudulent practices. Here's what happened, why it matters, and how we're building FarmCash differently.
item.author: Malcolm Lowry

item.title: Introducing FarmCash Jobs: A Community-Driven Wiki for Every Offer
item.description: FarmCash Jobs is live - a community wiki where users review, rate, and share real feedback on every offer. No more blindly starting jobs that are riddled with ads or impossible to complete.
item.author: Malcolm
